---
title: "Code"
format: html
editor: visual
execute: 
  eval : FALSE
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
```


```{r}
# 1. 使用你已经写好的代码读取数据
matchups <- read_csv("/Users/sly/Desktop/MarchMadness/2026_Potential_Matchups.csv")
team_results <- read_csv("/Users/sly/Desktop/MarchMadness/archive/Team Results.csv")
conf_results <- read_csv("/Users/sly/Desktop/MarchMadness/archive/Conference Results.csv")
```

```{r}
final_data <- matchups %>%
  # A. 用 HigherSeed (较高位种子队名) 匹配 TEAM (数据表队名)
  left_join(team_results, by = c("HigherSeed" = "TEAM")) %>%
  rename(High_PAKE = PAKE) %>%
  
  # B. 用 LowerSeed (较低位种子队名) 匹配 TEAM
  left_join(team_results, by = c("LowerSeed" = "TEAM")) %>%
  rename(Low_PAKE = PAKE) %>%
  
  mutate(
    Seed_Diff = HigherSeedNum - LowerSeedNum, 
    PAKE_Diff = High_PAKE - Low_PAKE,         
    
    # 计算实力差并转换为概率
    Power_Score = (0.15 * PAKE_Diff) - (0.10 * Seed_Diff),
    Predictions = 1 / (1 + exp(-Power_Score))
  )
```


```{r}
# ==========================================
# 整理导出
# ==========================================
submission <- final_data %>%
  select(HigherSeed, HigherSeedID, HigherSeedNum, LowerSeed, LowerSeedID, LowerSeedNum, Predictions) %>%
  # 如果极个别球队名字拼写有微小差异导致没匹配上，依然给 0.5 防报错
  mutate(Predictions = ifelse(is.na(Predictions), 0.5, Predictions))

write_csv(submission, "2026_Final_Submission.csv")
```
